examples: On a good day, each employee will shuck 3,500 oysters.
You should not shuck a little child.
Shuck your dirty shirt and put on a new one.
Shuck One, artiste graffeur, fondateur des collectifs de tagueurs et de graffeurs parisien DCM1 et Basal.
His mother grew up sleeping on a corn-shuck mattress and brushing her teeth with twigs.
